title: read_asset: summary is far smaller than verbose (size ordering)
automatedCoverage: compress.test.ts: compressed summary is >=70% smaller than raw YAML for a typical prefab
compress.test.ts: normal detail is smaller than verbose but larger than summary

steps.title: Prerequisites
steps.body: Bridge running. Optional, automated-covered quantitative check: confirm the compact summary is dramatically smaller than the raw YAML and that the summary ≤ normal ≤ verbose size ordering holds. The size math + folding is asserted by the automated tests below; this scenario is a runnable confidence pass against a live prefab.

steps.title: Stage a prefab with render-only children
Expected outcomes
items: summary response is a compact JSON object (asset/path/guid/objects/components + cmp table + folded tree), dramatically shorter than the raw .prefab
verbose response has collapsed: 0 (render-only folding disabled) and more rows than the summary
byte-size ordering holds: summary <= normal <= verbose
_cache: "miss" on the first read; subsequent reads stay "hit"

steps.title: Paste the responses (summary + verbose) with byte counts

reset.note: read_asset is read-only; the only artifact is the staged fixture, reverted by the afterStep delete.
